name: materialize_cut
description: Encode a trim spec or raw video segment into an H.264 clip. Used in workflows that require an actual video file before a subsequent step (e.g. remove_bg). Also useful for ad-hoc encoding and batch scripts.

input.description: Trim spec JSON (from waveform_trim / rm_fillers / etc.) or raw video file

output.description: Encoded H.264 clip with all cuts applied

params.name: input
params.description: Trim spec JSON or video file

params.name: inpoint
params.description: Keep from this source time (seconds). Used with raw video input.

params.name: outpoint
params.description: Keep to this source time (seconds). Used with raw video input.

params.name: cuts
params.description: JSON [[start,end],...] — time ranges to remove. Used with raw video input. Can be combined with --inpoint/--outpoint.
